overview.zh: 毛毯布勾机是重力选矿系统中用于金精矿富集的专用设备，特别适用于冲积金矿和微细粒重矿物的回收。设备结构简单、操作方便、维护简单，重选效率高，回收率可达99%以上，广泛应用于黄金和其他贵金属的选矿生产线。
overview.en: The Carpet Hooking Machine is a specialized equipment for gold concentrate enrichment in gravity separation systems, particularly suitable for the recovery of alluvial gold and fine-grained heavy minerals. With simple structure, easy operation and maintenance, high gravity separation efficiency, and recovery rate of over 99%, it is widely used in gold and other precious metal beneficiation production lines.

title.zh: 毛毯布勾机主要技术参数表
title.en: Technical Parameters of Carpet Hooking Machine

note.zh: 可按照客户需求进行定制
note.en: Can be customized according to customer requirements

zh: 采用特殊设计的绒毯，具有良好的捕集能力
机体结构紧凑，占地面积小
金精矿回收率高，可达99%以上
维护简单，更换毛毯方便
可与摇床、锯齿波跳汰机等设备配合使用
en: Special designed carpet with excellent collection capability
High gold concentrate recovery rate, over 99%
Low energy consumption and operating cost
Can be used with shaking tables, sawtooth wave jigs and other equipment

description.zh: 适用于各种类型的金矿石、砂金矿精选
description.en: Suitable for various types of gold ore and placer gold concentration

description.zh: 用于铂、钯、银等贵金属的回收
description.en: Used for recovery of platinum, palladium, silver and other precious metals

description.zh: 适用于钨、锡、钽铌等稀有矿物的分选
description.en: Suitable for separation of tungsten, tin, tantalum, niobium and other rare minerals
